positive: Symmetrical, highly stylized mandala design featuring interconnected cosmic flora and mythical, celestial fauna (such as stylized phoenixes, crescent moon motifs, and flowing constellations). The composition should rely on strong geometric patterns and flowing, continuous linework, creating a clean silhouette. Use a high-contrast, limited palette: deep midnight indigo, electric teal, luminous gold, and stark white. The aesthetic must be clean, detailed enough to look complex when printed, but structured enough to read clearly as a cohesive patch or graphic for apparel. Vector illustration style, minimalist, highly intricate, centered composition, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, signature, sloppy, poor quality, bad anatomy, ugly, low contrast, gradient wash, realistic photo, deep shadows
